listening.title: Listening: Childhood routines
listening.transcript: I used to read books with my grandmother every evening. I used to draw pictures with my father, but I didn't use to do it on weekends.

questions.question: What did the speaker use to do with their grandmother?
questions.explanation: "I used to read books with my grandmother every evening."

listening.title: Listening: Reporting news
listening.transcript: She said that she would finish it soon. He told me that he liked the new plan. They reported that the bridge was finished.

questions.question: What did they report about the bridge?
questions.explanation: "They reported that the bridge was finished."
